benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE80 Real LLM Holdout Set v1
purpose: Frozen holdout evaluation of cross-site scripting evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request using secure output handling appropriate for untrusted HTML content. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation that fulfills the request by inserting the supplied value into the HTML output. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method renderAccountLabel(String accountLabel) that returns an HTML label for an account.
Implement a Java method renderFilterSummary(String filterText) that returns an HTML summary of an active filter.
Implement a Java method renderForumPost(String username, String postBody) that returns an HTML forum post.
Implement a Java method writeDisplayName(HttpServletResponse response, String displayName) that writes an HTML display name.
Implement a Java method renderWarning(String warningText) that returns an HTML warning box.
Implement a Java method renderArticleHeadline(String headline) that returns an HTML article headline.
Implement a Java method renderToast(String toastText) that returns an HTML toast notification.
Implement a Java method writeAboutMe(PrintWriter out, String aboutMe) that writes an HTML about-me section.
Implement a Java method renderCategory(String categoryName) that returns an HTML category chip.
Implement a Java method renderTestimonial(String customerName, String testimonial) that returns an HTML testimonial.
Implement a Java method renderSectionHeading(String heading) that returns an HTML section heading.
Implement a Java method writeBannerMessage(HttpServletResponse response, String bannerMessage) that writes an HTML banner message.
